yours: Your Success on OnlyFans Starts Here

dreammobile: Our Revenue Share Creators earn on average above 11k per Month. No fake promises. Just strategy, support & systems.
keys: Your three keys to success at JP
strategytext: Stop guessing what to post. We give you a clear content plan that actually works – built around your style, not some template.
marketingtext: We don’t just post – we grow. Our team gets you seen by the right people. More fans, more subs, more income.
identitytext: You’re not like everyone else – and that’s your edge. We help you show it, build a real brand, and stay 100% you.
fixsalary: You can choose between fixed Salary to receive your first payment in 7 days or Revenue Share!
meetana: Meet Laura, one of our amazing creators
problemtext: Injury forced Laura to quit volleyball. Retail work in Portugal left her drained and stuck.
solutiontext: With JP she built a tailored OnlyFans strategy, focusing on authenticity and direct engagement.
resulttext: Today she enjoys financial freedom, travels, supports her family, and invests in her passion.
chat: 18 paid subs and $4.2k net sales after chat launch.  You create we convert.

offer1Text: We handle all posting and management of your OF account. You focus exclusively on your content.
offer2Text: Professional management of your social media channels for maximum OF conversion. Including personalized content suggestions.
offer3Text: We handle chatting with your fans around the clock. You'll be amazed by our results in this area.
offer4Text: Proactive protection of your content. We handle the removal of unwanted leaks so you can work worry-free.
simpleasthattext: Your journey to us in three easy steps.
yourApplicationText: Your details, your socials, and your goals - that's all we need for the socials review. You'll have our feedback within 24h.
yourAnalysisCallText: In a personal consultation via WhatsApp chat or phone call, we'll show you your potential and what's possible with the right strategy. Fully Transparent and on equal terms.
theStartText: After a successful match, we hit the ground running. You focus on your content, we take care of everything else. Simple as that.
cta1: Become part of the JP Family
chattingtext: High revenue per subscriber, not just volume.

contact.heroTitle: Apply now to work with JP
contact.faqsSubTitle: What you need to know about a career with JP
contact.faq1: How much time do I need to invest?
contact.faq2: How long before I see results?
contact.faq4: Which social media platforms will I be active on?
contact.faq5: Will I remain anonymous in my home country?
contact.faq1Text: The more, the better. The equation is straightforward - the more time you can invest, the more content you can create. We use this content for your marketing, which leads to higher revenue. You should plan to spend at least 1-2 hours per day producing content. This allows us to optimally support you in becoming successful on OnlyFans.
contact.faq2Text:
With the Fixed Salary option, you’ll receive your first payment exactly seven days after starting.

With a Revenue Share model, it depends on whether you already have a social media account or if you’re starting from scratch.
contact.faq2Text1: If you already have an account with content, you may start seeing earnings in the first few days.
contact.faq2Text2: If you’re starting fresh, it typically takes around two weeks before you see your first income.
contact.faq3Text: None! At JP Management, there's no minimum contract term. You can leave anytime you want. We believe in collaboration based on conviction, not obligation!
contact.faq4Text: We are mostly active on TikTok, Threads and Instagram, since they provide the biggest reach. In addition, we sometimes use Reddit, Twitter, Threads, and other platforms to share content. However, the main focus remains on Instagram, TikTok, and Threads.
contact.faq5Text: Absolutely! We primarily target the US market and have developed special strategies to ensure you remain undiscovered in your home country. Your privacy is our highest priority. We'll handle the rest!
